'''Bor-Kal Vuluk''' was a [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] who served the [[Jedi/Legends|order]] during the [[New Sith Wars]]. Vuluk died on the battlefield of [[Ruusan/Legends|Ruusan]], leaving his or her [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] to be sought by future archaeologists.
